zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Vaux於1220年出生在英國林可爾史爾福萊斯頓時，他的父親Oliver de Vaux46歲，母親Petronilla Craon46歲。他於大約1250年與Joan Pelevile在英國諾福爾可特尼結婚。他去世於1287年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 沃爾頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Vaux was born in 1220, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Oliver de Vaux, was 46 and his mother, Petronilla Craon, was 46. He married Joan Pelevile about 1250, in Pentney, Norfolk, England. He died in 1287, in West Walton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Vaux est né en 1220, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Oliver de Vaux, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Petronilla Craon, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Joan Pelevile environ 1250, à Pentney, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1287, à West Walton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Vaux(이)가 1220년 영국 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Oliver de Vaux(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla Craon(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국 노르폴크 펜트니에서 Joan Pelevile(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 월턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Vaux родился в 1220 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Oliver de Vaux было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla Craon, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Pelevile около 1250 г. в местности пентни, норфолк, Англия. Он умер в 1287 г. в местности вест валтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.
